subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of the Most Glorious Beauty! Your distinguished letter was received, and its detailed meanings brought gladness to hearts [3.5s]... ...Thou hast written that during this summer thou art intending to travel to different parts to deliver the glad tidings… Convey my greetings to Thomas Breakwell
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال ابهی نامه نامی رسید و معانی مشروح سبب انشراح قلوب گردید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for protection, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
